examples: Many of the indigenous insects are needed to pollinate the local plants.
Bees pollinate 90 commercial crops worldwide, including most fruit and vegetables such as alfalfa, nuts, and oil-seed rape.
It had long been thought that hummingbirds, which forage by day, pollinate its red flowers and that hawkmoths, which forage at night, pollinate its white flowers.
She adds that for a healthy environment you need all kinds of bees because they pollinate different plants.
"You cross-pollinate one business with another one, and then you have something going, " says Wirtz.
